caption: This news broadcast features a series of graphics overlays on a background image of a government building. A red banner at the top of each frame reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". On the left, a portrait of a man is accompanied by the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". On the right, two portraits are shown: one of a man labeled "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and another smaller portrait labeled "विजय चौधरी". In the center, a large yellow and red "BREAKING NEWS" banner spans the bottom. As the sequence progresses, additional graphics appear, including a box labeled "सभा" and another stating "कुल सीटें 42". A map of West Bengal appears with the text "पश्चिम बंगाल" and "2019 लोक सभा" overlaid on it. A man in a white shirt is shown in the center of the screen during the later frames. A timestamp at the bottom right indicates "10:08 PM".
